title: Notifications - Master Toggle OFF -  Update Available
scenario: No "Update Available" notification appears upon successful pairing when Notifications master toggle is OFF in App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile phone.
2. Navigate to App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts.
3. Set the Notifications master toggle to OFF.
4. Ensure the paired Poly audio device has a firmware version lower than the current version available on the server.
5. Close the app to the background (do not force close).
6. Initiate pairing between the mobile phone and the Poly audio device (e.g., press the Bluetooth button on the device).
7. Wait for successful pairing to complete.
8. Observe the notification area on the mobile phone for any "Update Available" notification.
expected: No "Update Available" notification appears upon successful pairing.
